title: Tabs: Visit Multiple Sites
drDigitalIntro:
Tabs let you visit several websites in one window.
• Click the + button to open a new tab.
• Click a tab to switch between sites.
• Close a tab with its X, or press Ctrl+W.

playgroundTask.goal: Open a tab, use it, then close it

steps.say: Tabs let you keep several sites open at once. Click the + button to open a new tab.
Your new tab is empty. Type google.com in the address bar and press Enter to load a site in it.
Done with a tab? Click the ✕ on the Google tab to close it.
steps.title: Google

drDigitalSuccess: You opened a new tab, loaded a site, and closed it. Tabs let you juggle many websites in one window.
drDigitalHint: The + button is at the end of the tab row. The ✕ to close a tab is on the tab itself.
